title: Akujo no irojikake: Kamotte kaikan!
original_title: 悪女の色仕掛け カモって快感！
overview: Ren and Ryozo, a couple of con artists with an age difference, are asked by former yakuza Warafu to investigate his wife Maki's infidelity. However, Maki is a sponsor of the entertainment production company that Ren and his friends are targeting for a fraud...

trailers.title: 映画『女詐欺師レン ～キケンな情事を追え！～』予告編
